C[ChradH: I've got _no_ experience with fighting games like this :)
C[ChradH: I just counted... Thanks for the game.

C[apt1002: This move was hard. I considered 1- and 2-space low and high pincers. I considered a high extension. In all cases, however, I would lose sente. Then, B would defend the top left and W would be behind. This move (Q3) is one that B cannot ignore (for fear of L3 or similar) and that protects the corner sufficiently that I should be able to tenuki.
apt1002: Next I hope to play C14, the approximately symmetrical move. Hopefully this will leave B with a similar problem. :-)
apt1002: W R12 looks good but it is no real threat as long as B S18 remains possible.
apt1002: W S18 B R11 W P9 might be a good sequence at some point.
C[apt1002: It looks like H17 has scored me about 18 points, plus stability for my top group, in gote. I am satisfied.
apt1002: How important is G7 area?
apt1002: I think B F18 was a mistake. http://senseis.xmp.net/?InvasionOfThirdLineThreeSpaceExtension
apt1002: I think B D17 should be C15: http://senseis.xmp.net/?44PointLowApproachLowExtensionSlidePincer33
apt1002: F14 looks like a key point. I think B will play there soon.
apt1002: With hindsight, the D14/E12 exchange looks good for B. Maybe inconsistent with W H17? I'm not sure which one was bad.

apt1002: The shape in the TL is common, and is usually seen as bad for W. In this case, however, B is arguably overconcentrated in the area around E17. The same shape with two more spaces would still be solid. W's group is at least alive.
C[apt1002: W F14 remains possible, and looks good. I think I might be 15 points ahead.
C[apt1002: W has now missed the opportunity to play W M4, B M3, W O4, but has nearly closed off the invasion B R7 or similar, and got W J3. Seems good on balance, but I'm not sure.
C[apt1002: W found it difficult to choose between G7, F14 and R12.
C[apt1002: With hindsight, I think W G7 was an overplay, as it allows B a double threat. However, I think B H4 might also be an overplay. We shall see! It will be messy.
C[apt1002: B G5 could have been H3, I think, for an extra few points, but there is no strategic difference.
C[apt1002: I think B G6 was an unnecessary gote move. W gets sente to play F14.
C[apt1002: With hindsight, W R12 doesn't do much. :-(
C[apt1002: W B13 was unnecessary, I think.
apt1002: B has a monkey jump to T12, and W has no good defence against it.
apt1002: Oh man! Those remarks were meant to go into the Malkovitch log. I am such an ass!
apt1002: Apparently donkeys are censored on this site. :-)
apt1002: I think W is about 20 points ahead. Not sure how to count the middle.
C[apt1002: W should have played G8, not L14.
apt1002: Didn't spot that B G8 is atari.
